{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113511787A38ABF7EC11148E537"}"},"total":204},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7241518571023893286","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"“九子夺嫡”“弑父称帝”怕是世人对雍正最深刻的印象了，的确 清宫里无论是宫廷建筑还是礼仪乐律都是极其讲究，而里面的权力斗争，明争暗斗更是常人难以想象。这一部描绘雍正一生的章回体小说，从九王夺嫡雍正险胜开始，到其掌管紫禁城，整肃吏治，擢用新人。平定边疆战乱，巡视各省事务；雍正一代英雄。而本书还加入了大量对当时历史背景，众生画卷的描述，气势恢宏；秦楼酒肆，市井风情在作者笔下都得到的淋漓尽致的体现。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1686047537,"group_id":"7126785686614576158","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"这是一个很有脑洞，很神奇，很奇怪的文字产出者","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/HpfUW27RVVWaiOfxnjaGs=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d61687aeac7346c8aa7158cc841c592d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618920&x-signature=VI21qegIDg4bOh29CeWBctcZ0xs%3D","user_id":"899837327326315","user_name":"我的真名叫王小飞"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"899837327326315","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7126785686614576158","book_info":{"abstract":"九王夺嫡，雍正险胜，紫禁城新桃换旧符。但树欲静而风未止，皇城内外，大江南北，仍杀机四伏。八爷党死而未僵，取代之心，咄咄逼人；专阃将军年羹尧倨功自傲，拥军干政；连托孤重臣隆科多也脚踏两只船，擅派兵丁入禁苑。一时间，风急浪险，浮云蔽日。沧海横流，正试帝王才干。
雍正依靠方苞等股肱重臣，整肃吏治，擢用新人田文镜、刘墨林等，不顾安危，巡视黄河防务，体恤民心。借青海大捷之利，雕弓轻舒，粉碎八爷党和十四弟政变阴谋，圈禁隆科多，赐杀年羹尧。 
本书涉笔广泛，场面恢宏，有波谲云诡的政治斗争，缠绵悱恻的儿女情长，并且结构上较上卷更为详略得当，疏密有致。作家擅长写帝王史实，对宫闱秘闻，分寸把握得当，特别是对宫廷斗争中微妙的人际关系，权谋机变，揣摩体味得玲珑剔透。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/b0cbec2ec191186f431cb278ffd3c75f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"二月河 著","author_id":"","book_id":"7126785686614576158","book_name":"雍正皇帝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0f0d8","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"40.4万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":988,"name":"历史小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=988&name=历史小说&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7581385811367578686","read_count":"5426","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1176194"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"162","tags":"历史,历史小说","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b0cbec2ec191186f431cb278ffd3c75f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779256277&x-signature=mOovBQ0oEWFQX%2BDElIWJug28mFc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113511787A38ABF7EC11148E537"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5076},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7267775340129993532","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"是看过剧版之后来看书的，相对于剧版来说，前期夺嫡部分可能显得稍微有那么一点点优柔寡断，但是后面登机之后的部分就更加细腻，人物关系也串联的非常完美，尤其是雍正和怡亲王之间的那种兄弟情感，也是剧版没有突出的一个部分，总的来说，是一部优秀的基于历史创作的历史小说，爱看，多看","text_exts":[{"e":128,"s":124,"text":"历史小说","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740722771148E537%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227267775340129993532%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227126785686614576158%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1692160891,"group_id":"7126785686614576158","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0DAO2LEZFVc/XKOGtycx3iPEkSH2eqx6F0AkfA8o4VM","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619584&x-signature=COIg0Cf24es9cyIKjPOtpxTq078%3D","user_id":"4240195650080631","user_name":"醉卧龙岗"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4240195650080631","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7126785686614576158","book_info":{"abstract":"九王夺嫡，雍正险胜，紫禁城新桃换旧符。但树欲静而风未止，皇城内外，大江南北，仍杀机四伏。八爷党死而未僵，取代之心，咄咄逼人；专阃将军年羹尧倨功自傲，拥军干政；连托孤重臣隆科多也脚踏两只船，擅派兵丁入禁苑。一时间，风急浪险，浮云蔽日。沧海横流，正试帝王才干。
雍正依靠方苞等股肱重臣，整肃吏治，擢用新人田文镜、刘墨林等，不顾安危，巡视黄河防务，体恤民心。借青海大捷之利，雕弓轻舒，粉碎八爷党和十四弟政变阴谋，圈禁隆科多，赐杀年羹尧。 
本书涉笔广泛，场面恢宏，有波谲云诡的政治斗争，缠绵悱恻的儿女情长，并且结构上较上卷更为详略得当，疏密有致。作家擅长写帝王史实，对宫闱秘闻，分寸把握得当，特别是对宫廷斗争中微妙的人际关系，权谋机变，揣摩体味得玲珑剔透。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/b0cbec2ec191186f431cb278ffd3c75f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"二月河
